validation_year: TZ_2023 (rules in force 30 June 2023; Finance Act 2022 state)
note: TAZMOD TZ_2023 active-instrument map to governing Tanzania mainland law. Instrument keys are the model's EUROMOD-convention policy names (structure metadata only; no licensed content). Governing-law attributions are working hypotheses until the print hunt confirms them; source URLs are hunting grounds, not captured provenance - capture happens in axiom-corpus manifests.

instruments.instrument: tin_tz (individual income tax: PAYE and accounts bases)
instruments.governing_law: Income Tax Act (Cap. 332), First Schedule paragraph 1(1) resident individual annual schedule (0% to 3,240,000 TZS; 8% to 6,240,000; 20% to 9,120,000; 25% to 12,000,000; 30% above - the Finance Act 2020 restructuring in force through 30 June 2023); accounts basis for turnover above the presumptive ceiling or mixed income

Income Tax Act (Cap. 332), First Schedule paragraph 2(3) presumptive table for individuals with turnover up to TZS 100,000,000 (nil to 4,000,000; the 3 percent and 3.5 percent marginal arms as amended)
Public Service Social Security Fund Act, 2018 (No. 2 of 2018): member 5 percent + employer 15 percent of monthly salary

National Social Security Fund Act (Cap. 50): 20 percent of wages with the employer paying not less than 10 percent - TAZMOD applies 5 percent + 5 percent for private formal workers, a finding candidate pending the print
National Health Insurance Fund Act (Cap. 395) and its contribution instrument: 3 percent employee + 3 percent employer
Value Added Tax Act, 2014 (Cap. 148): 18 percent standard rate (mainland)

Excise (Management and Tariff) Act (Cap. 147), Fourth Schedule as amended through the Finance Act 2022: beer 918 TZS/litre, wine 2,959.74/litre, spirits 3,655.05/litre, cigarettes 35.31/unit, cigars 30 percent, other tobacco 33,878.88/kg, diesel 768/litre, petrol 892/litre (the fuel figures may combine excise with petroleum levies - the print adjudicates)
Administrative: TASAF Productive Social Safety Net programme documentation (fixed basic transfer; TAZMOD constants carry 12,000 TZS/month adult and 5,000 child amounts)

instruments.instrument: bsa01_tz (PSSN variable conditional cash transfer, 2021 onward)
instruments.governing_law: Administrative: TASAF PSSN conditional transfers (infant 5,000 capped 5,000; primary 4,000 capped 12,000; secondary 8,000 capped 16,000; disabled 5,000 capped 5,000 - per month)
Administrative: TASAF PSSN public works component (eligibility flag only in TZ_2023)
